/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/sitesim.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sitesim.dir/src/p25/TSBK.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sitesim.dir/src/p25/Frame.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sitesim.dir/src/p25/C4FM.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sitesim.dir/src/tx/SoapyTx.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sitesim.dir/src/tx/ControlChannel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sitesim.dir/src/ui/App.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sitesim.dir/src/ui/SitePanel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sitesim.dir/src/ui/CCPanel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sitesim.dir/src/ui/LogPanel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sitesim.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sitesim.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sitesim.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sitesim.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sitesim.dir/third_party/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_sdl2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sitesim.dir/third_party/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o -o sitesim  -lSoapySDR -lSDL2 -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
